components.label: This agreement governs your use of this web application, including form creation, file uploads, PDF generation, sharing links, and electronic acknowledgments.
I am responsible for all activity performed under my account.
I will maintain credential confidentiality and use strong authentication controls.
I will promptly report unauthorized access, account compromise, or suspicious behavior.
I acknowledge that services are provided according to company policy.
I agree to use company systems for authorized business purposes only.
I will protect credentials and report any suspected security incident immediately.
I understand that violations may result in suspension of service access.
I will not upload malicious software, harmful scripts, or unlawful content.
I will not attempt unauthorized access, privilege escalation, or service disruption.
I will not reverse engineer or misuse the platform beyond approved business use.
I consent to processing of my data for service delivery and compliance.
I agree to comply with information security, retention, and confidentiality rules.
I understand uploaded files and form data may be retained for audit, backup, and operational support.
=== Shared Links and Form Copy Behavior ===
I understand shared URLs may copy forms into another user profile as a separate editable record.
I understand copied forms can diverge from the original and are independently managed by the receiving user.
I acknowledge that my electronic signature/typed signature is my acceptance of this agreement.
I confirm that I have authority to agree to these terms on behalf of my role or team.
I understand service availability may be affected by maintenance, incidents, and third-party dependencies.
I acknowledge features and policies may be updated with notice as required by company governance.
I acknowledge the service is provided according to applicable policy and operational constraints.
I agree to comply with applicable laws, organizational policy, and acceptable use standards.
I have read, understood, and agree to all terms in this User Service Agreement.
